items.title: Air Canada suspends flights to Cuba because of aviation fuel shortage
items.description: Air Canada said Monday it is suspending service to Cuba because of a shortage of aviation fuel on the island

items.title: Airlines can no longer refuel on island as US blockade deepens energy crisis: Cuba
items.description: Cuban aviation officials have warned airlines of a fuel shortage for refueling on the island

items.title: What to know about student loan repayment plans and collections

items.title: Wall Street opens lower after markets rally in Asia
items.description: A rally for global stock markets that began in Asia petered out by the time trading got to Wall Street
